section_title: SYNTHETIC rear-yard demonstration (NOT an official capture)

source.verification_required: SYNTHETIC - this snapshot was NOT captured from any official source. It exists only to prove that a structurally different rule family (a minimum rear-yard depth in linear feet) is representable in the DSL with ZERO engine changes. Its values are illustrative and must never be used as a legal statement; a real rear-yard rule requires official capture + G6 approval.

verbatim_excerpt: SYNTHETIC (not verbatim from any source): For the purposes of this representability demonstration, a minimum rear yard depth of 30 feet applies in the indicated district.
notes: Second-family representability proof for M4-T001 RE-S5.
Structurally different from FAR: the output is a minimum linear dimension (feet), not a ratio times area.
SYNTHETIC illustrative value; not a Verified determination and not an official-source capture.
